ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Your callback will receive the day and calendar parameters and must return a string or number
ast.target: 你的回调函数将接收 day 和 calendar 参数，并且必须返回一个 string 或 number

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: How strong the precipitation is, when it occurs

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Link the event to a note

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Use this to override what is displayed for a given day.
ast.target: 用于覆盖某一天显示的内容。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
The display format of your era can be whatever
                                you want, but you can also include the following
                                options:
ast.target:
时代的显示格式可以随你设置，但也可以包含以下
                                选项：

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
{{ abs_year }} - Displays the current year,
                                    but without a minus in front of it if is negative.
ast.target:
{{ abs_year }} - 显示当前年份，
                                    如果为负数，则不显示前面的负号。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
{{ nth_year }} - Display the year with an
                                    ordinal (1st, 2nd, etc).
ast.target:
{{ nth_year }} - 以序数显示年份
                                    （1st、2nd 等）。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
{{ abs_nth_year }} - Combination of abs_year
                                    and nth_year.
ast.target: {{ abs_nth_year }} - abs_year 与 nth_year 的组合。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
{{ era_year }} - The current era year. If
                                    any eras in the past has restarted the year count,
                                    this number will be different than the year number.
ast.target:
{{ era_year }} - 当前时代的年份。如果
                                    过去的某些时代重新开始了年份计数，
                                    该数字将不同于年份数。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
{{ era_nth_year }} - Similar to nth_year,
                                    but counting only the era years.
ast.target:
{{ era_nth_year }} - 类似于 nth_year，
                                    但仅计算时代年份。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
{{ era_name }} - Inserts the current name
                                    of the era
ast.target: {{ era_name }} - 插入当前时代的名称

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: This can always be toggled in the calendar menu.
ast.target: 可随时在日历菜单中切换。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Change how the start and end dates for seasons are calculated
ast.target: 更改季节开始和结束日期的计算方式

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
Locations are different regions of your world that can have
                their own weather settings.
ast.target:
地点是你世界中的不同区域，可以拥有
                各自的天气设置。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Choose a location to use by default.
ast.target: 选择一个默认使用的地点。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: No calendars created! Create one in settings to get started.
ast.target: 尚未创建日历！请在设置中创建一个以开始使用。

ast.name: info
ast.source: Beginning full rescan for calendar events
ast.target: 开始对日历事件进行完整重新扫描

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Apply a common Calendarium as a preset.
ast.target: 将常用的 Calendarium 作为预设应用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: By default, the first three letters of the name will be used.
ast.target: 默认使用名称的前三个字母。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
If true, the leap day will not apply when the year meets the condition.

Requires the leap day to have at least one non-exclusive condition.
ast.target:
如果为真，当年份满足条件时闰日将不适用。

要求闰日至少有一个非互斥条件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The condition will ignore the leap day's offset when checking to apply.
ast.target: 条件在检查是否应用时会忽略闰日的偏移。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How many days it takes for the moon to complete a full cycle.
ast.target: 月亮完成一个完整周期所需的天数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shift the starting moon phase by a number of days.
ast.target: 将起始月相按若干天进行偏移。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Seasons will transition to the next season over this number of days.
ast.target: 季节将在此天数内过渡到下一季。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of days before the 'peak' weather of the season. Typically this occurs a few months into the season.
ast.target: 距离该季节“峰值”天气的天数。通常发生在该季节开始后的几个月。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How long a season's peak weather lasts.
ast.target: 季节的峰值天气持续多久。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Views will open to this calendar by default.
ast.target: 视图将默认打开此日历。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Calendarium can be restricted to look at certain paths in your vault for events. You can add specific paths here and associate default calendars to those paths. If no calendar is selected, Calendarium will add the event to your default calendar, if any.
ast.target: 可将 Calendarium 限制为仅在你的仓库中特定路径中查找事件。你可以在此添加特定路径，并为这些路径关联默认日历。如果未选择日历，Calendarium 将把事件添加到你的默认日历（若有）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: All confirmations set to "Don't Ask Again" will be reset.
ast.target: 所有设置为“Don't Ask Again”的确认将被重置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Control how the plugin reloads data when a sync is detected.
ast.target: 控制检测到同步时插件如何重新加载数据。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Parse note titles for event dates
ast.target: 从笔记标题解析事件日期

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 不可想象的事情发生了

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The moon must have a name.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The moon must have a positive cycle.
ast.target: 卫星必须有一个正周期。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: There was an issue opening that calendar.
ast.target: 打开该日历时出现问题。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Display day of year in Day View
ast.target: 在日视图中显示一年中的第几天

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Only notes with this tag will be scanned for inline events
ast.target: 仅扫描带有此标签的笔记以查找内联事件

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Weeks will flow into the next month. Disable to reset the weekday each month.
ast.target: 周将延续到下个月。禁用后每月重置星期。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Intercalary months will appear a distinct months in the calendar.
ast.target: 闰月将在日历中作为独立的月份显示。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Offset the year the leap day is applied to.

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Intercalary days interrupt the normal flow of the month.
ast.target: 闰日会打断月份的正常进程。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If true, the leap day will not apply when the year meets the condition.\n\nRequires the leap day to have at least one non-exclusive condition.
ast.target: 如果为真，当年份满足该条件时将不会应用闰日。\n\n要求该闰日至少有一个非排他条件。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The condition will ignore the leap day's offset when checking to apply.
ast.target: 在检查是否应用时，该条件将忽略闰日的偏移。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Display moons by default when viewing this calendar.
ast.target: 查看此日历时默认显示月亮。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A new year will begin the date this era starts.
ast.target: 新的一年将从此纪元开始的日期起算。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When seasonal colors are displayed, show a gradient between one color and the next.
ast.target: 显示季节颜色时，在相邻颜色之间显示渐变。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Offset the first season from the start of the year. An offset of 0 means the seasons start on 1/1/0001.
ast.target: 将第一个季节从年初开始偏移。偏移为 0 表示季节从 1/1/0001 开始。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Evenly distribute the year between your seasons, taking into account month length and leap days.
ast.target: 在考虑月份长度和闰日的情况下，将一年在各季节之间均匀分配。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Show seasonal colors on the calendar. Can be changed using the calendar settings menu.
ast.target: 在日历上显示季节颜色。可通过日历设置菜单更改。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A calendar for the real world.
ast.target: 一个面向真实世界的日历。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the summer solstice, the Sun travels the longest path through the sky, and that day therefore has the most daylight.
ast.target: 在夏至，太阳在天空中行经的路径最长，因此这一天的日照时间最多。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The winter solstice marks the shortest day and longest night of the year, when the sun is at its lowest arc in the sky.
ast.target: 冬至标志着一年中白昼最短、黑夜最长，此时太阳在天空中的弧度最低。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The equinox marks the day and the night is equally as long.
ast.target: 春分标志着白天与夜晚等长。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Christmas is a Christian holiday celebrating the birth of Christ. Due to a combination of marketability and long lasting traditions it is popular even among many non-Christians, especially in countries that have a strong Christian tradition.
ast.target: 圣诞节是基督教庆祝基督诞生的节日。由于商业推广与长期传统的共同作用，它在许多非基督徒中也很受欢迎，尤其是在具有深厚基督教传统的国家。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first full moon after march 21st, which is considered the fixed date for the spring equinox.
ast.target: 3月21日之后的第一个满月，3月21日被视为春分的固定日期。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Easter is considered the most important feast for Christians, celebrating the resurrection of Christ. It is classed as a moveable feast occurring on the first full moon after the spring equinox, which is considered to be fixed at March 21st for the sake of computing the date.
ast.target: 复活节被视为基督徒最重要的节日，庆祝基督的复活。它属于可移动节日，发生在春分之后的第一个满月，为便于计算日期，春分被固定为3月21日。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Monday following the Easter Sunday is often considered part of the Easter Celebration and is a day off in many countries with a strong Christian tradition.
ast.target: 复活节主日后的星期一通常被视为复活节庆祝的一部分，在许多具有深厚基督教传统的国家是休息日。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Celebrated exactly 50 days after Easter, Pentecost is the celebration of the Holy Spirit appearing before the Apostles as described in the Bible.
ast.target: 五旬节在复活节后第50天庆祝，是对《圣经》中圣灵显现在使徒面前的纪念。

ast.name: description
ast.source: New Year's Day marks the date of a new year on the Gregorian Calendar. It dates when the clock strikes midnight and is often celebrated with fireworks, champagne and kissing.
ast.target: 元旦标志着公历新一年的开始。它始于午夜钟声敲响之时，常以烟花、香槟和亲吻来庆祝。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Halloween is holiday popular in the US, Canada and Ireland that has gradually been adopted by more and more countries. It is often celebrated by people dressing up, usually as something scary. Children will often go from door to door shouting "trick or treat" in the hopes of receiving candy, while adults tend to go to parties.
ast.target: 万圣节是一个在美国、加拿大和爱尔兰很受欢迎的节日，逐渐被越来越多国家所接受。人们常通过化装来庆祝，通常扮成可怕的形象。孩子们常挨家挨户喊着“不给糖就捣蛋”以索取糖果，而成人则多参加派对。

ast.name: description
ast.source: On this day in 1582 the Gregorian calendar was officially introduced, following Thursday October 4th on the Julian Calendar
ast.target: 1582年的这一天，公历被正式引入，紧接着儒略历的10月4日星期四。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The 4th of Growfest is the first day of Low Summer in Oerth's Calendar. This is the point where the sun crosses Oerth's equator. Holidays celebrated on this date include Saint Cuthbert's Day, the Feast of Edoira, the Spring Feast, and Raxivort's Orgy. This is also the day on which the priests of Tlaloc ritually sacrifice and eat the flesh of human children or babies in their patron's honor. Worshippers of Rillifane Rallathil celebrate the Budding on this day, a joyful celebration of new life celebrated through dance and song in oak groves in the heart of the forest. A ritual hunt of a noble heart is held on this day, after which the venison is eaten in celebration of Rillifane's bounty.

Also celebrated on this date is the Sanctification of Renewal, a sacred holiday to the followers of Garyx.
ast.target:
Growfest 4日是Oerth历法中低夏的第一天。这是太阳穿越Oerth赤道之时。此日庆祝的节日包括Saint Cuthbert's Day、Feast of Edoira、Spring Feast以及Raxivort's Orgy。这一天也是Tlaloc的祭司为纪念其守护神而仪式性地祭献并食用人类儿童或婴儿肉的日子。Rillifane Rallathil的信徒在这一天庆祝Budding，这是在森林中心的橡树林中以歌舞庆祝新生命的欢乐节日。这一天还会举行一场高贵之心的仪式性狩猎，之后以食用鹿肉来庆祝Rillifane的馈赠。

同日还会庆祝Sanctification of Renewal，这是Garyx信徒的神圣节日。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the summer solstice, the Sun travels the longest path through the sky, and that day therefore has the most daylight.
ast.target: 在夏至，太阳在天空中走过最长的路径，因此这一天的日照时间最长。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The 4th of Brewfest is the Autumnal Equinox, when the sun crosses the equator from north to south. This date is the official end of high summer and the beginning of autumn on the Greyhawk Calendar. This date is holy to Wenta and is sometimes regarded as an unofficial holy day of Velnius. Among the xvarts, it also marks the celebration of Raxivort's Orgy. The worshippers of Rillifane Rallathil celebrate the Transformation on this day, a time of dancing and spiritual rebirth marking the beginning of autumn and the promise that spring will come again.
ast.target: Brewfest 4日是秋分，太阳从北向南穿越赤道。这一天在Greyhawk历法中标志着盛夏的正式结束和秋季的开始。这一日期对Wenta而言是神圣的，有时也被视为Velnius的非官方圣日。在xvarts之中，这一天也标志着Raxivort's Orgy的庆典。Rillifane Rallathil的信徒在这一天庆祝Transformation，这是一个以舞蹈和精神再生为主题的时刻，标志着秋季的开始并承诺春天将再度来临。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The night of Great Moon's Glory on Readying 11th, when Luna is full but Celene is new. It is holy to Celestian, and a time when offerings are left to Atroa to beg her to come early and to Telchur to request that he peacefully leave. Druids of the Old Faith are known to also hold this night as auspicious, but few outside their circles know the details.
ast.target: Readying 11日的Great Moon's Glory之夜，此时Luna为满月而Celene为新月。这一夜对Celestian而言神圣，人们会向Atroa献供以祈求她早日来临，并向Telchur祈请他安然离去。旧信仰的德鲁伊也认为这一夜吉祥，但圈外人很少知道其细节。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The Feast of Edoira is a holiday celebrated in the Domain of Greyhawk on Growfest 4, during the Spring Equinox. It is named after Edoira, a priest of Rao who centuries ago established the Edoiran Compact, a pact by which many of the lawful good-aligned faiths and people of the Domain could agree to cooperate. The Compact was later extended to non-lawful good and neutral faiths.

Edoira was never deified but was revered by many good faiths in the Domain. The holiday was marked by religious services on Godsday of Growfest led by the clerics of the good faiths who partook of the Compact, and secular festivals by the ordinary citizenry. Observance of the holiday has declined over the years, though the clergies of Rao and Pelor still hold their traditional interfaith services, with occasional participation by the priesthoods of Heironeous and Mayaheine. Since the end of the Greyhawk Wars most of the Domain's outlying communities no longer observe the holiday. Only one church in Safeton still does so.
ast.target:
Feast of Edoira是在Greyhawk领地于Growfest 4日（春分期间）庆祝的节日。它以Rao的牧师Edoira命名，Edoira在数百年前建立了Edoiran Compact，这是一项使领地内许多守序善良阵营的信仰与人民同意合作的契约。该契约后来扩展到非守序善良与中立的信仰。

Edoira从未被神化，但在领地内许多善良信仰中备受尊崇。该节日的标志是在Growfest的Godsday，由参与契约的善良信仰神职人员主持宗教仪式，以及普通市民的世俗庆典。多年来对该节日的遵行逐渐减少，尽管Rao与Pelor的神职人员仍会举行传统的跨信仰仪式，偶尔有Heironeous与Mayaheine的祭司参与。自Greyhawk Wars结束后，领地的大多数边远社区不再庆祝该节日，只有Safeton的一座教堂仍然遵行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Holy Day of Serenity, on Reaping 10, is celebrated in Veluna as a holy day of Rao, though it's actually the anniversary of Veluna's secession from Furyondy in 476 CY. It is celebrated with religious singing and worship.
ast.target: 宁静圣日于收获月10日举行，在维鲁纳被庆祝为饶的圣日，尽管实际上这是维鲁纳于476 CY从弗尤隆迪分离的周年纪念。人们以宗教歌唱和礼拜来庆祝。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calendar for the world of Pathfinder.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Longnight is a holiday celebrated on the full moon in the winter month of Abadius. During the festival, revelers stay up all night to greet the dawn to defy the long winter months. It is even celebrated in Irrisen, where there are no natural seasons.
ast.target: 长夜节是在冬月阿巴迪乌斯的满月之夜庆祝的节日。节日期间，狂欢者整夜不眠迎接黎明，以对抗漫长的冬季。即便在没有自然季节的伊里森也会庆祝。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Abadar

Vault Day is a holiday held on 6 Abadius in honor of Abadar, Master of the First Vault.
ast.target:
阿巴达尔

宝库日是在阿巴迪乌斯月6日举行的节日，以纪念第一宝库之主阿巴达尔。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Pharasma

Priests and worshipers of the Lady of Graves parade the bodies of the recently dead on this holiday, holding free burials afterwards.
ast.target:
法拉丝玛

在这个节日里，坟墓女士的祭司与信徒会游行展示新近亡者的遗体，之后提供免费安葬。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Korvosa

Sable Company Founding Day is a holiday marking the founding of the Sable Company of the Varisian city-state of Korvosa. Celebrated on 6 Pharast, the day is marked by somber military parades that generally preclude the consumption of alcohol, a staple on most other holidays.
ast.target:
科沃萨

黑貂公司成立日是纪念瓦瑞西亚城邦科沃萨的黑貂公司成立的节日。于法拉斯特月6日庆祝，这一天以肃穆的军队游行作为标志，通常会禁止饮酒——而这在大多数其他节日中是常见之物。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Gozreh

Firstbloom is a holiday celebrating the first planting of the agricultural season, and generally associated with the weather god Gozreh. It falls on the vernal equinox. Many farming communities see it as the beginning of the year, even though conventional calendars begin two months earlier. Despite weariness after a full day planting, many farming communities hold celebrations come the night: feasting, dancing and courtship feature showing the cycle of nature.
ast.target:
戈兹瑞

初芽节是庆祝农耕季首次播种的节日，通常与天气之神戈兹瑞相关。它落在春分之日。许多农业社区把它视为新年的开始，尽管传统日历早两个月就已开始。尽管劳作一日后疲惫不堪，许多农社到了夜晚仍会举行庆典：盛宴、舞蹈与求偶等活动展现自然的循环。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Gozreh

On this religious holiday, all who travel on the water make offerings to Gozreh in the hopes of safe passage for the coming year.
ast.target:
戈兹瑞

在这个宗教节日里，所有水上旅行者都会向戈兹瑞献祭，以祈求来年行程平安。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Absalom

One of two local festivals where kite-battlers compete.
ast.target:
阿布萨罗姆

当地两大风筝对战节之一。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Sarenrae

The holy, month-long festival ends on this day, featuring dances with flaming blades.
ast.target:
莎伦瑞

为期一月的圣祭在这一天结束，特色是挥舞燃烧刀刃的舞蹈。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Andoran, Milani

Holiday celebrating Andoran's independence. Milanites celebrate that very little violence occurred.
ast.target:
安多兰，米拉妮

庆祝安多兰独立的节日。米拉妮的信徒庆祝其中几乎未发生暴力。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Andoran

The Eagle Knights perform aerial displays in Almas on this day.
ast.target:
安多兰

当天，鹰骑士会在阿尔玛斯进行空中表演。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Korvosa

An early summer holiday that honors a cooling shift in the winds, celebrated with much drinking.
ast.target:
科沃萨

初夏的节日，纪念风向转凉的变化，以大量饮酒庆祝。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Ustalav

The Day of Silenced Whispers is an Ustalavic holiday celebrated every 9 Arodus marking the defeat of the Whispering Tyrant in 3827 AR by the coalition forces of the Shining Crusade and the liberation of the country after centuries of undead domination.
ast.target:
乌斯塔拉夫

寂语之日是乌斯塔拉夫的节日，于阿罗杜斯月9日庆祝，纪念在3827 AR，辉耀十字军的联军击败低语暴君，并在经历数世纪不死统治后解放该国。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Ilsurian, Varisia

Festival celebrating the founding by Ilsur of the town of Ilsurian in 4631 AR.
ast.target:
伊尔苏里安，瓦瑞西亚

庆祝伊尔苏于4631 AR建立伊尔苏里安镇的节日。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Aroden, Iomedae, Milani

The raucous, week-long festival known as Armasse is held each year beginning on 16 Arodus. The celebration \u2014 once dedicated to the god Aroden \u2014 is still important to the faithful of Iomedae, who use it to train commoners in combat, ordain apprentice clergy, pick squires for knights, and teach military history, hoping to prevent the mistakes of the past from being repeated. Among those not dedicated to the Inheritor the holiday has lost most of its religious significance since Aroden's death, tending now only toward wild partying, a fact that has precluded the diabolist authorities of Cheliax from prohibiting Armasse outright. Nevertheless, in places where the church of Asmodeus is openly allowed, it hosts special activities for its parishioners during the same week in an effort to counter the influence of the holiday. The city of Corentyn is especially known for its extravagant Armasse festivities.
ast.target:
Aroden, Iomedae, Milani

喧闹、持续一周的节日“阿玛塞”每年于阿罗德斯月16日开始举行。该庆典\u2014曾献给神祇阿罗登\u2014对艾奥美黛的信徒仍很重要，他们借此训练平民战斗、按立见习教士、为骑士挑选侍从，并教授军事史，希望避免重蹈覆辙。对不信奉“继承者”的人来说，自阿罗登死后这一节日已失去大部分宗教意义，如今更趋向于狂欢作乐，这也使切利亚斯的恶魔崇拜当局无法完全禁止阿玛塞。尽管如此，在阿斯莫德斯教会被公开允许的地方，它会在同一周为教民举办特别活动，以对抗该节日的影响。科伦廷城尤以其奢华的阿玛塞庆典闻名。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Korvosa

Quiet holiday honoring the birth of Saint Alika the Martyr.
ast.target:
科沃萨

纪念殉道者圣阿莉卡诞生的宁静节日。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Korvosa

Founding Festival is a local Korvosan celebration marking the establishment of the city in 4407 AR. Held annually on 14 Erastus, the festival is a chance for the citizens to let off some steam, drink copiously, and watch magical light shows late into the night.
ast.target:
科沃萨

建城节是科沃萨当地的庆典，纪念该城于AR 4407年建立。每年伊拉图斯月14日举行，为市民提供发泄压力、畅饮并欣赏深夜魔法灯光秀的机会。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Festival of Night's Return

Nidal

Celebrated throughout Nidal, this holiday involves the burning of effigies and self-flagellation.

Swallowtail Festival

Desna

Holiday celebrated with storytelling, feasting, and the release of butterflies.

Waning Light Festival

Segada

Also called Blessing of the Sun and Night of Spirits, participants bid farewell to the long days of sunshine with feasting, dancing, and music.
ast.target:
夜归节

尼达尔

在整个尼达尔庆祝的节日，包括焚烧人偶和自我鞭笞。

燕尾蝶节

德丝娜

以讲故事、盛宴和放飞蝴蝶来庆祝的节日。

光衰节

塞加达

亦称“太阳的祝福”与“灵之夜”，参与者以盛宴、舞蹈与音乐告别漫长的晴日。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Korvosa

Crabfest is a Korvosan holiday held on the first Wealday of Rova. It celebrates the return of the crabs from the cooler waters of the Jeggare River to their winter habitat in Conqueror's Bay, and is marked by crab boil feasts held throughout the city and its surrounding communities.
ast.target:
科沃萨

蟹节是科沃萨的节日，于罗瓦月第一个韦尔日举行。它庆祝螃蟹从杰加河较冷水域回到征服者湾的冬季栖息地，并以全城及周边社区举办的煮蟹盛宴为标志。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Irrisen

This "celebration of plenty" festival mocks the traditional harvest festivals celebrated in the region before Baba Yaga and her eternal winter descended upon the land.
ast.target:
伊里森

这场“丰饶庆典”节日嘲弄了巴巴雅加与她的永恒寒冬降临此地之前该地区的传统丰收节。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Ydersius

Once many holidays were celebrated by the faith of Ydersius, but today only this date has much significance.
ast.target:
伊德西乌斯

过去伊德西乌斯信众曾庆祝诸多节日，但如今仅此日期仍具重要意义。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Jalmeri

Admani Upastuti is a Jalmeri holiday celebrated on the first full moon of Lamashan that marks the founding of Jalmeray as a Vudran colony.
ast.target:
贾尔梅里

阿德玛尼·乌帕斯图提是贾尔梅里的节日，于拉玛尚月的第一个满月庆祝，纪念贾尔梅雷作为瓦德兰殖民地的建立。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Solku

Bastion Day is a two-day festival held annually on 19 and 20 Lamashan in the Katapeshi town of Solku honoring the founding of the town, when it is traditional to host a stranger from one noon until the next.
ast.target:
索尔库

堡垒节是卡塔佩什城镇索尔库每年拉玛尚月19日至20日举行的两日节庆，以纪念该镇的建立，传统上会从一个中午招待一位陌生人直到次日中午。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Absalom

The second of two local festivals where kite-battlers compete.
ast.target:
阿布萨罗姆

两项本地风筝斗士竞赛节庆中的第二个。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Galt

Marks the beginning of the Red Revolution.
ast.target:
盖尔特

标志红色革命的开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Nethys

Abjurant Day occurs on 8 Neth and is known as a day of cooperation between neighbors to shore up mutual defenses and train allies in magic. Potential apprentices are often tested on the day.
ast.target:
内希斯

防护日于内斯月8日举行，是邻里协作巩固共同防御并训练盟友魔法的一天。潜在学徒常在当天接受测试。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Irrisen

In the Irriseni Baptism of Ice, an annual fertility festival held from the 24th to the 30th of Neth, locals parade all children born during the year through the town in fine clothes. In most towns, the festival ends with a symbolic sacrifice of a child to the cold. However, in Whitethrone and Irrisen's provincial capitals, a peasant child is killed through exposure.
ast.target:
伊里森

在伊里森的冰之洗礼中，这是一年一度的生育节，於内斯月24日至30日举行。当地人会让当年出生的所有孩子穿着华服游行穿过城镇。在大多数城镇，节日以象征性地把一个孩子献祭给寒冷作为结束。然而在白王座城及伊里森各省会，实际会让一名农民孩子因暴露在严寒中而丧生。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Traditional feast; time for courting and spending time with friends.
ast.target: 传统宴会；用于求爱与与朋友相聚的时刻。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Korvosa

Korvosa's Pseudodragon Festival, a holiday celebrated annually on 7 Kuthona, marks the winter migration of wild pseudodragons from the Mindspin Mountains to Conqueror's Bay, which inspires the creatures already in the city\u2014even those domesticated\u2014to play with their wild kin in the skies over the city. Locals mark the day with a joyous inebriation.
ast.target:
科沃萨

科沃萨的伪龙节是每年库索纳月7日庆祝的节日，纪念野生伪龙从脉旋山脉迁徙至征服者湾越冬，这也激励城中已有的生物\u2014即便是被驯化的\u2014与其野生同族在城市上空嬉戏。当地人以欢快的酩酊庆祝这一天。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Naderi

Holiday celebrating Naderi's ascension. Celebrations are typically understated but include readings of The Lay of Arden and Lysena.
ast.target:
Naderi

庆祝纳德里升神的节日。庆祝活动通常较为低调，但会诵读《阿登与利瑟娜之歌》。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Groetus

Cultists of Groetus perform an hour's silence at dusk on the last day of the year and seek guidance from their god about the End Time.
ast.target:
Groetus

格罗图斯的信徒在年末最后一天的黄昏保持一小时的沉默，并向他们的神祈求有关末日的指引。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Erastil

This holy week to the god Erastil is a time of heavy work in the fields for farmers.
ast.target:
Erastil

这是一周献给神埃拉斯提尔的圣期，对农民而言是田间劳作繁重的时节。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Norgorber

Day marking the apotheosis of the Reaper of Reputation.
ast.target:
Norgorber

纪念“名誉收割者”登神的日子。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Gruhastha

Celebration of the revelation of the Azvadeva Pujila, with gifts of books, celebrations of knowledge, blessing of animals, and a vegetarian feast.
ast.target:
Gruhastha

庆祝阿兹瓦德瓦·普吉拉的显现，包括赠送书籍、崇尚知识的庆典、为动物祝福，以及一场素食盛宴。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Andoran

A market day that focuses on unusual crafts and offers games to children who dress up for the occasion.
ast.target:
Andoran

一个以罕见工艺品为主的集市日，并为盛装打扮的孩子们提供游戏。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Andoran

Silverglazer Sunday is a two-part Andoren national festival that is held on the last Sunday of Arodus and the first Sunday of Rova every year. Celebrants spend the two Sundays fishing, holding swimming competitions, and making enormous puppets.
ast.target:
Andoran

“银釉星期日”是安多伦的双段全国性节庆，每年在阿罗德斯的最后一个星期日和罗瓦的第一个星期日举行。庆祝者在这两个星期日钓鱼、举办游泳比赛，并制作巨型木偶。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calendar of the world of Eberron.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Tain Gala is a notable event held on the first Far of each month in Sharn.
ast.target: 坦因盛会是在夏恩每月第一个法尔日举办的重要活动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The longest night of the year.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Purified new year; a night for spiritual vigil and guarding against evil.
ast.target: 净化者的新年；一个守夜冥想并防御邪恶的夜晚。

ast.name: description
ast.source: On this day each year, the Purified celebrate the lives and sacrifice of all followers of the Flame who died while fighting evil and protecting the faithful.
ast.target: 每年的这一天，净化者纪念所有在对抗邪恶、守护信众时牺牲的圣焰追随者的生命与奉献。

ast.name: description
ast.source: On this day, the Silver Flame work, give gifts, and partake in joyous celebration out of thankfulness for the new planting season and the birth of Tira Miron - the Voice of the Silver Flame.
ast.target: 在这一天，银焰信徒劳作、赠礼并欢庆，以感谢新的播种季节以及蒂拉·米隆——银焰之声——的诞生。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Sovereign Host enjoys this festival of peace, and of setting aside differences, in the name of Dol Arrah.
ast.target: 主权众神在多尔·阿拉的名义下享受这场和平之节，并暂时搁置分歧。

ast.name: description
ast.source: An old and misunderstood, yet immensely popular, holiday wherein followers of the Silver Flame gather to share pastries and treats created by bakers within their fold.
ast.target: 一个古老且被误解、却极受欢迎的节日，银焰信徒聚集在一起分享由本教烘焙师制作的点心与甜品。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A controversial holiday outside of the Silver Flame faith, on this day the Purified honor the Silver Flame for the promise of paradise. They also honor (without worship) the Sovereign Host for having created the world, before stepping aside to allow the Flame its rightful place as the last god of Eberron.
ast.target: 作为白银之焰信仰之外颇具争议的节日，在这一天，净化者为天堂的承诺而敬奉白银之焰。他们也会（不进行崇拜地）致敬主权诸神，感谢其创造了世界，并在随后退位，让焰火获得其作为艾伯伦最后神明的应有地位。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The Sovereign Host celebrate Balinor with communal hunts of dangerous creatures. 

In Sharn, a dangerous beast*, whose transport to the city was arranged by the priests of Balinor, is released into the Depths of the Lower-City. Open to any who would participate (and pay an entry fee in the form of a 5gp donation), the victor must return with the beast's head to receive a 500gp purse, local fame, and the blessing of Balinor. 



*often a singular beast, it can be several - which then requires the victor to return with the most skins.
ast.target:
主权诸神以集体狩猎危险生物来庆祝巴利诺。 

在沙恩，一只危险的野兽*（由巴利诺的祭司安排运送进城）被放入下城深处。任何人都可参与（并以 5gp 捐款作为报名费），胜者必须带回兽首，方可获得 500gp 的奖金、本地声望以及巴利诺的祝福。 



*通常是一只野兽，也可能有多只——这时胜者必须带回最多的兽皮。

ast.name: description
ast.source: With the The Fury (the Sovereign of Passion and Madness) reaching the height of her power on this night, people find it difficult to control or restrain their impulses - once the sun sets, public revelry in the streets climbs to joyous or, all too often, dangerous levels, calming only as the sun rises on the following morning.
ast.target: 在这夜，“狂怒”（激情与疯狂的主权者）力量达到巅峰，人们很难控制或抑制冲动——太阳一落山，街头的公开狂欢便升至欢腾、或（太过频繁地）危险的程度，直到次日清晨日出才会平息。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Though one of the least high holy days, it is marked by brief prayers and church services in the honor of the birth of Saint Voltros - the first paladin called to only serve the Silver Flame.
ast.target: 虽是最不重要的圣日之一，但会以简短的祷告与教会礼拜来纪念圣沃尔特罗斯的诞生——他是首位被召唤仅侍奉白银之焰的圣武士。

ast.name: description
ast.source: On this day in 996, the Treaty of Thronehold was signed, formally ending the Last War. Annual celebratory feasts are held throughout the Five Nations to mark this auspicious and long-awaited event.
ast.target: 996 年的这一天，《王座堡条约》签署，正式结束了终末之战。五国各地每年都会举行庆祝宴会，以纪念这一吉祥且久盼的事件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As dark magic dominates over these three days of the Long Shadows, the myth of Sovereign Lord Aureon's stolen shadow is forefront in the minds of the people. Most will spend these days indoors huddled around the warmth of a fire, but those few who worship the dark deity use this time to prey upon the weak and the foolish.
ast.target: 在长影这三天里黑暗魔法占据上风，主权之主奥瑞安影子被盗的神话便占据人们心头。大多数人会在室内围火取暖度过，但少数崇拜黑暗神祇者会趁此时机掠夺弱者与愚者。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The spring equinox is when the day and the night are equally as long, and are getting longer.
ast.target: 春分时，白昼与夜晚等长，且白昼在逐渐变长。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The autumn equinox is when the day and the night are equally as long, and are getting shorter.
ast.target: 秋分时，白昼与夜晚等长，且白昼在逐渐变短。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calendar of the realm of Barovia, home of Strahd.
ast.target: 巴罗维亚王国的历法，斯特拉德的故乡。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Winter Solstice is the day of the year with the least time between sunrise and sunset. Many western cultures consider it the official date of winter.
ast.target: 冬至是一年中日出与日落间隔最短的一天。许多西方文化将其视为冬季的正式日期。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The Summer Solstice is the day of the year with the most time between 
sunrise and sunset. Many western cultures consider it the official date
 of summer.
ast.target: 夏至是一年中日出与日落间隔最长的一天。许多西方文化将其视为夏季的正式日期。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The Spring Equinox,
also called the Vernal Equinox, is the day between the winter and
summer solstices where the day is the exact same length as the night.
Many western cultures consider it the official date of Spring.
ast.target:
春分，
又称春分点，是冬至与夏至之间昼夜等长的一天。
许多西方文化将其视为春季的正式日期。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The Autumnal Equinox,
also called the Fall Equinox, is the midpoint between the summer and
winter solstices, where the day is the exact same length as the night.
Many western cultures consider it the official date of Autumn.
ast.target:
秋分，
又称秋分点，是夏至与冬至之间的中点，昼夜等长。
许多西方文化将其视为秋季的正式日期。

ast.name: description
ast.source: New Year's day marks the date of a new year.
ast.target: 元旦标志着新一年的开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This holiday is up to the calendar owner to decide what it is for! :)
ast.target: 这个节日由日历所有者决定其用途！:)

ast.name: description
ast.source: Spring begins early in the month of Dualahei, officially dateing on the 13th with the Renewal Festival.
ast.target: 春天在Dualahei月初开始，官方日期为13日的Renewal Festival。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Moradin's holy day is Deep Solace, which is celebrated on the eighteenth day of the fifth month. Especially devout followers of the All-Hammer spend the day in isolation, meditating on the meaning of family and how they may be better mothers, fathers, siblings, and children.

The dwarven communities across Exandria, such as the ones in Grimgolir and Kraghammer, celebrate with a full day of feasting and drinking.\xA0
ast.target:
Moradin的圣日是Deep Solace，在第五个月的第十八日庆祝。尤其虔诚的All-Hammer信徒会独自度过这一天，冥想家庭的意义以及他们如何成为更好的母亲、父亲、兄弟姐妹和孩子。

埃克桑德里亚各地的矮人社区，例如Grimgolir和Kraghammer的社区，以整日的盛宴和饮酒来庆祝。\xA0

ast.name: description
ast.source: Summer begins in the middle of Unndilar, officially dateing at noon on the 26th day known as the Zenith.
ast.target: 夏季在Unndilar月中开始，官方日期为第26天中午，称为Zenith。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Autumn begins on the 3rd of Fessuran and is typically celebrated with feasting in rural regions and with carnivals in the cities.
ast.target: 秋季在Fessuran的第3日开始，通常在乡村以盛宴庆祝，在城市则以狂欢节庆祝。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
This day celebrates the freedom of Tal'Dorei from Errevon the Rimelord. It is the peak of the winter season, so devout followers of the Matron of Ravens (as the goddess of winter) consider it to be one of her holy days.

However, in most of the land, people see Winter's Crest as a secular holiday, often celebrated with omnipresent music in public areas, lavish gift-giving to relatives and loved ones, and the cutting and decorating of trees placed indoors. The Sun Tree in Whitestone is often decorated with lights and other baubles for Winter's Crest.
ast.target:
这一天庆祝Tal'Dorei摆脱冰霜领主Errevon的自由。它是冬季的顶峰，因此乌鸦女神的虔诚信徒（作为冬季女神）将其视为她的圣日之一。

然而，在大多数地区，人们把Winter's Crest视为世俗节日，常在公共场所播放无处不在的音乐，向亲友赠送丰厚礼物，并砍伐并装饰摆在室内的树木。Whitestone的Sun Tree常为Winter's Crest装点灯饰和其他饰物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calendar of Faerûn of the Forgotten Realms.
ast.target: 被遗忘的国度中费伦的历法。

ast.name: label
ast.source: The calendar must have a name

ast.name: label
ast.source: At least one weekday is required

ast.name: label
ast.source: At least one month is required

ast.name: label
ast.source: At least one condition is required

ast.name: label
ast.source: At least one year is required when using custom years
ast.target: 使用自定义年份时至少需要一个年份

ast.name: label
ast.source: Your seasons are not fully distributed and could drift over time.
ast.target: 你的季节分布不均，随着时间可能会偏移。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Create a new event category to see it here.
ast.target: 创建新的事件类别以在此处查看。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Create a new event to see it here.
ast.target: 创建新的事件以在此处查看。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Create a new weekday to see it here.
ast.target: 创建新的工作日以在此处查看。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Create a new month to see it here.
ast.target: 创建新的月份以在此处查看。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Create a new leap day to see it here.
ast.target: 创建新的闰日以在此处查看。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Create a new year to see it here.
ast.target: 创建新的年份以在此处查看。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Create a new moon to see it here.
ast.target: 创建新的月亮以在此处查看。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Create a new era to see it here.
ast.target: 创建新的纪元以在此处查看。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Create a new season to see it here.
ast.target: 创建新的季节以在此处查看。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Create a new location to see it here.
ast.target: 创建新的地点以在此处查看。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 埃奥德雷德二世国王诞辰

ast.name: name
ast.target: 奥古斯塔纳的赖特家族

ast.name: name

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将当前日期设为下一天

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将当前日期设为前一天

ast.name: text
ast.source: Your settings have been changed externally (e.g., from sync). Would you like to reload Calendarium settings?
ast.target: 你的设置已在外部更改（例如通过同步）。是否要重新加载 Calendarium 设置？

ast.name: text
ast.source: How should Calendarium reload your data in the future?
ast.target: 今后 Calendarium 应如何重新加载你的数据？

ast.name: text
ast.source: This behavior can be changed in settings.
ast.target: 此行为可在设置中更改。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Would you like to migrate your existing Fantasy Calendar settings to Calendarium?
ast.target: 是否要将现有的 Fantasy Calendar 设置迁移到 Calendarium？

ast.name: text
ast.source: You have the same event path registered to multiple calendars.
ast.target: 你将相同的事件路径注册到了多个日历中。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Please review your event path settings.
ast.target: 请检查你的事件路径设置。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Are you sure you want to delete this calendar?

ast.name: text
ast.source: Additional information is required to save this calendar. Any changes you may have made will be discarded if you exit now.
ast.target: 保存此日历需要额外信息。如果你现在退出，你可能已做的任何更改都将被丢弃。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Event dates will be displayed using this format.
ast.target: 事件日期将使用此格式显示。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Information on how the format works can be seen
ast.target: 有关此格式如何工作的说明可见于

ast.name: text
ast.source: only the years added below will be displayed.
ast.target: 仅显示下方添加的年份。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The weather will be calculated using this data during this season.
ast.target: 在此季节期间，天气将使用此数据进行计算。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The surrounding seasons will also affect the weather, but the closer you are to the peak, the stronger the current effect is.
ast.target: 周围季节也会影响天气，但越接近峰值，当前影响就越强。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This will be used to do all weather calculations.
ast.target: 这将用于进行所有天气计算。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The same seed will return the same weather for the same calendar.
ast.target: 相同的种子会为同一日历生成相同的天气。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This will overwrite your existing data file.
ast.target: 这将覆盖你现有的数据文件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No calendars created! Create a calendar to see it here.
ast.target: 未创建任何日历！创建一个日历以在此处查看。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Use the core Page Preview plugin to display event notes when hovered.
ast.target: 使用核心 Page Preview 插件在悬停时显示事件备注。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The Page Preview plugin is required to modify this setting.
ast.target: 修改此设置需要 Page Preview 插件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Calendarium will find events defined in your notes. Events discovered in this way will only be added to one calendar.
ast.target: Calendarium 会查找你笔记中定义的事件。以这种方式发现的事件只会添加到一个日历中。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Use the following settings to match events found in a folder to a specific calendar. The most specific path (the most nested folder) will be used.
ast.target: 使用以下设置将文件夹中找到的事件匹配到特定日历。将使用最具体的路径（最深层的文件夹）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Parse the vault for Calendarium events.
ast.target: 解析库中的 Calendarium 事件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No calendars created! Create a calendar to use this feature.
ast.target: 未创建任何日历！创建一个日历以使用此功能。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The plugin will show debug messages when events are added, deleted or updated by the file watcher.
ast.target: 当文件监视器添加、删除或更新事件时，插件将显示调试消息。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No calendar by that name was found.

ast.name: text
ast.source: Calendarium has been unloaded. Re-enable the plugin to render your calendars.
ast.target: Calendarium 已卸载。重新启用插件以渲染你的日历。
